column8: Pablo Picasso was born in 1881 and died in 1973. He's an extremely well-known_________. (PAINT)
column9: Although he was born in Spain, he spent most of his_______________life in Paris. (AMAZE)
column10: Most of Picasso's pictures are quite______________to look at, as the contain strange shapes and very weird faces. (USUAL)
column11: His pictures are very bright. ________________ often say they are dramatic works of art. (VIEW)
column12: Picasso had close________________with several other famous people from that time, including Henti Matisse and Gertrude Stein. (FRIEND)
column13: His talent was widely recognised during his lifetime, and when people think of the greatest artists of all time, they_____________think of him. (GENERAL)
column14: When Nick returned from his holiday, he met his friend Jill for a drink. She asked him if he had had a__________time. (RELAX)
column15: Nick said he'd really enjoyed swimming and visiting all the_____________, but that it hadn't all been perfect. (ATTRACT)
column16: Because of this, Jill asked him what had made him____________during the trip. (HAPPY)
column17: Nick replied that he hadn't really liked the hot weather. "You can't__________enjoy yourself when you're sweating all the time", he said. (EASY)
column18: Jill reminded him that now he was back in London, where it was grey and__________ . (CLOUD)
column19: "I know" said Nick, "but_______________I still have some sunborn from Thailand to keep me warm!" (LUCKY)
